reasoning: I will distill the article into a single, present-tense, headline-like sentence that emphasizes the Scottish Chambers of Commerce's positive outlook for 2017 and include the direct quote from Neil Amner.
output: Neil Amner, chairman of the Scottish Chambers of Commerce economic advisory group, says, "Our latest economic data shows that many Scottish businesses will have a successful 2017, with business optimism remaining positive for many sectors," as exporters continue to report healthy growth despite price pressures.
